title: phase2 integration into main flow
goal: Phase2で追加した未接続関数のうち、completion評価とusage抽出を main() と report フローへ接続する
constraints: must preserve existing runtime flow except required integration points
must not add new api calls
allowed_changes_detail: orchestration/run_session.py: connect evaluate_completion_decision into report flow as additional payload field only
orchestration/run_session.py: connect extract_api_usage into prepared_spec and implementation response handling only
orchestration/run_session.py: pass api_usage and api_call_count into persist_session_reports
forbidden_changes: run_preflight_validation redesign or new preflight flow
